extraction.one_line_summary: ONASANYA defeated Elia Viviani in a sprint after Degenkolb was stranded too deep (5th position) when Cofidis lead-out disintegrated.
tactical_patterns: Cofidis train collapsed before final 300m, leaving Degenkolb in 5th position forcing abandonment of sprint effort.
Elia Viviani launched sprint too early allowing drafting rider to carry momentum past him at line.
Movistar posted fastest TTT despite not being noted TTT specialists, signaling Valverde team peaking early.

rider_signals.DEGENKOLB John: negative: caught in wrong position (5th wheel) after lead-out train failed, abandoned sprint effort entirely
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: initiated sprint prematurely, allowed slipstream rider to pip him at line showing poor timing judgment
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Movistar TTT unexpectedly competitive (fastest time pre-penalty) suggesting strong collective form for team leader
